english translation text: PRAY THAT HUSSAIN SHOWS US A MIRACLE, PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)

urdu transliteration text:
Naseeb jald mujhe shah ki ziyarat ho
Mujhe bhi kaash kisi shab me yeh basharat ho
Chalo utho ke tumhe aaj lene aaye Hussain
phir ek baar hume karbala bulaae Hussain
@HujjatELC
Dua Karo Ke Ko Mojiza Dikhae Hussain – Pray that Hussain shows us a miracle
english translation text:
MAY I BE DESTINED FOR THE ZIYARAT OF HUSSAIN
MAY I GET THIS GOOD NEWS ONE EVENING…
…THAT COME, TODAY HUSSAIN HAS COME TO COLLECT YOU
… PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)
PRAY THAT HUSSAIN SHOWS US A MIRACLE, PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)

urdu transliteration text:

phir ek baar hume karbala bulaae Hussain
THAT PERSON, WHOSE SHRINE JIBRA’EEL CLEANS

Dua Karo Ke Ko Mojiza Dikhae Hussain – Pray that Hussain shows us a miracle
english translation text:

PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)
PRAY THAT HUSSAIN SHOWS US A MIRACLE, PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)

urdu transliteration text:

PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)

urdu transliteration text:

phir ek baar hume karbala bulaae Hussain

english translation text:

PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)

urdu transliteration text:

phir ek baar hume karbala bulaae Hussain

urdu transliteration text:

phir ek baar hume karbala bulaae Hussain
@HujjatELC
Dua Karo Ke Ko Mojiza Dikhae Hussain – Pray that Hussain shows us a miracle
english translation text:
‘JARI’ (RECITOR NAME), TELL THE WORLD – DO WHAT YOU WANT
WE WILL SPILL OUR BLOOD, WE WILL BECOME MARTYRS
BUT ‘AKAASH’ (POET’S NAME) – WE WILL NOT LEAVE THE ‘AZA’ OF HUSSAIN!
PRAY THAT HE SHOWS US KARBALA (ONCE AGAIN)
